headline: Opening Pressure in Alkenstar
summary: The crew regroups at the Barrel & Bullet Saloon while Mugland's urban network starts squeezing every lead, favor, and safe angle in the city.
expectedDirection: Use the saloon as the first staging ground, then push outward into deals, grudges, corruption, and city-wide pressure.
notes: Seed session for the timeline page. This is intentionally light and can be replaced once fuller session planning lands.
